LanguageData.ARA_Possession.label: Arachne
LanguageData.ARA_Possession.description: The body of this creature was taken over by the Arachne protozoa, and it was impossible for the original owner of this body to come back.
LanguageData.ARA_Facehugger_LowOperation.label: Arachne
LanguageData.ARA_Facehugger_LowOperation.description: The Arachne protozoa separated from its host is not only very fragile, but its small body cannot allow it to undertake professional work.
